g.text: Collects prior work and constraints from references
Checks if evidence is feasible and sufficient to proceed
Converts ideas into structured goal handoff
Defines explicit objectives and success criteria
Dispatches work to theory and experiment branches
Combines branch outputs into unified state
Routes to synthesize, rework, or rethink
Drafts manuscript sections and integrates artifacts
Scores output quality and requests revision if needed
Runs final artifact and quality validations
Empirical design, run, and verification branch
